textByHashes.ee2521a10073e9cfe19f611b5251ed0b684d7ce5: Please... don't hurt us. We'll do anything!
textByHashes.58474ac934647f88fd85c0359e6f4b339f3f5c20: You must be new around here. Lord Jovkai isn't like the rest of your lot. He keeps us well looked after.
textByHashes.4084d245478694bf134c6769b92ddbd84e4f8937: Oh yes. A nice bed, good food and clean clothes. All he asks in return is a bit of blood from time to time. Lovely guy.
textByHashes.3cb03479427948595bdf1bf1e2fdb81461a2fdb1: Oh I'm great. Lord Jovkai takes good care of us.
textByHashes.7c85006b36653db6796f7ad4e55a8e7792117de8: Why would I want to do that? I'm very happy as I am.
